title: BKXCHA 2in1 Electric Fly Swatter, 4000V Fly Zapper Racket with Auto & Manual Mode, 1800mAh USB Rechargeable Bug Zapper Racket with Charging Base, 3 Layers Mesh, LED Light, Indoor Outdoor Fly Killer
bullet_points: 🗲【4000V High-Voltage Power】The fly swatter delivers a potent 4000V electric current, instantly eliminating insects upon contact with the high-voltage grid. It effectively eradicates not only mosquitoes but also flies, fruit flies, midges, wasps, spiders, hornets, and moths.

🗲【2 in1 Mosquito Racket】In ON1 mode, hold the button and wave the electric fly zapper to repel flying insects; in ON2 mode, insert the head into the base, and the electric fly swatter will emit light at a wavelength of 360-400 nanometres to attract and eliminate insects, with particularly effective results when used at night.

🗲【3 Layer Safety Net Design】The bug zapper racket features three protective nets: two outer layers shield the high-voltage grid, while the central dense mesh ensures effortless elimination upon contact with insects like mosquitoes and flies. Accidental contact by children or pets poses no risk.

🗲【1800mAh Battery with Dual Charging】The fly zapper electric indoor uk features a removable 1800mAh battery supporting two convenient Type-C charging modes: both the charging base and handle can be used for charging, meeting flexible charging needs. The LED power indicator on the handle allows you to monitor battery status at any time.

🗲【Indoors and Outdoors】Compact and portable, the fly swatter electric zapper is the ideal companion for bedrooms, kitchens, gardens, camping, travel, fishing, outdoor activities, or barbecues. Carry the electric fly swatter racket with you to banish pesky insects from your life.
